what_it_does: Stores YAML frontmatter metadata for a channel attachment that references a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
The target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-6e7ea4f6.
standouts: Target URI board://item-6e7ea4f6 links the attachment to a board item.
attachment_type is board_items, indicating a typed relationship.
Timestamped provenance is recorded in the added field.
concerns: The file contains no payload or description beyond the metadata link.
The referenced board item cannot be resolved from this file alone.
notes: A timestamped, typed attachment record that points to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does board://item-6e7ea4f6 represent?
What is the intended payload or artifact attached to this record?
Why is the attachment classified as board_items rather than another type?
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later retrieval, indexing, or audit.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI scheme to target a board item, distinguishing board-item attachments from file or message attachments.
contribution: Provides a canonical attachment identifier and a typed, timestamped reference to a board item, supporting indexing and traversal of board-related attachments in the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: YAML frontmatter attachment metadata with id att-b162f4e2 for the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items and targeting board://item-6e7ea4f6, recorded at 2026-06-24T01:32:20.851225+00:00.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a timestamped, typed link from a channel attachment to a specific board item.
